actual_questions: Has management made an irrevocable election to measure this equity investment at fair value through other comprehensive income (FVOCI), or will it be measured at fair value through profit or loss (FVTPL)? This determines whether the $100,000 transaction fee should be capitalized as part of the investment cost or expensed immediately.
